jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at PGIMER
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
